calendar.matters: Amended Notice Of Motion And Motion To Vacate Dismissal

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Vacate Dismissal
Off Calendar Apr-21-2026 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Mar-02-2026 Dismissal - No Appearance

MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS
Off Calendar Feb-25-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances
Plaintiff Idris Pippins appeared in pro per via Zoom Video Webinar.
Edward Singer, Jr., Esq. representing Defendant Lawrence Kennedy.

Hearing held.

Defedant counsel requests discretion of the Court to grant the motion and offers proof in support of the request.
Plaintiff responds to Court's query.

After hearing the argument, the Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT LAWRENCE KENNEDY MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS

is DENIED. This statutory motion for Judgment on the Pleadings is not set for hearing in accordance with CCP 438(e).

Prevailing Party to submit proposed order that is in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b).

Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: K. Valdes; Not Reported. (D501)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Summary Judgment Or In The Alternative Summary Adjudication
Off Calendar May-05-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances, tentative ruling adopted as follows:

PLAINTIFF IDRIS PIPPINS Notice Of Motion And Motion For Summary Judgment Or In The Alternative Summary Adjudication is OFF CALENDAR. Insufficient Notice per CCP section 437c(a)(2).

Judge: Dennis W. Hayashi ; Clerk: L. Young ; Not Reported. (D501)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Summary Judgment Or In The Alternative Summary Adjudication
Off Calendar Apr-24-2025 Continued To May-05-25 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: PLAINTIFF IDRIS PIPPINS' Motion For Summary Judgment Or In The Alternative Summary Adjudication.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

This matter is transferred to be heard on May 5, 2025 at 9:30 a.m. in Dept. 501 (landlord/tenant dispute). The parties are ordered to provide courtesy copies to Dept. 501 reflecting the new hearing date, no later than April 28, 2025.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (301/CVA)
